column1: Hi! My name is Christina and I’m one of the girls planning on joining in on the Punta Cana trip with Gia’s group for spring break. If it’s okay I had a few questions the girls were asking so I could communicate this info back to them?
Okk so we know we gotta do the deposit first and I believe that's $200, correct? But then after that how does the payment plan work?
Yeaa yup so the deposit gets you all secured and reserved. The payment plan is broken into two installments
The next payment is the final balance. Due in about 2 weeks, so the 27th
Yup! Deposit basically holds your place and gives you a few weeks to get the balance in
Ok alright sounds good! Thank you!
We lookin forward to havin yall roll with us
Not as of right now! If anything else comes up I'll text you thank you soooo much
Aight dope! Yea np just lmk
Would we be able to do an option with 4 girls in one room? so two girls per bed?
The max occupancy is 3 per room so we'd have to do 2 & 3
Is there no other payment options? Like the only option would be to pay $200 and then pay the rest in two weeks?
That's really all we have right now. Most groups are just about done paying today actually
ok ok no worries I thought i'd see anyways
I think we're okay but somebody had asked if there were multiple options or only on
Yes! I believe Gia said he was going to text you, but we are locked in with the plan of doing one 3 person room
3 of us girls are good to go and ready to pay deposit if we are able to set it up so we have a 3 person room
Okay cool. The other 2 aren't going anymore?
Okay no prob. You can still use the same link Gia sent you. I'll send it in a sec
Hi the other two girls paid and i'm trying to pay right now but it's not letting me
this is what i see on my end
Did you click it and back out of it?
Ohh okay it cleared for me
is there a reason it says overdue?
Am i still good to go through with payment?
Okay perfect doing mine rn and the other girls are already good
Thank you soooo much we're so hype
also I was reading through the contract and it mentioned flights...?
i'm a little bit confused on that
Nah the flights piece doesn't pertain to your package since you don't have flights through us
We have one general customer agreement and do have some travelers that have flights with ys
Alright we all paid the 200:)) Thank you so much for your help we're so excited
Yea just hmu here any time if you have any questions. and once you get your flight info just add that to your account so we can set up your transportation from the airpot
Hey Spiffy! It’s Christina G from the punta cana trip! I just wanted to let you know that me, Laynie, and Tiffani added our flight info into the trip itinerary
you'll be receiving your pre departure emails in the next few days!

Hey! Just wanted to reach out because in the email we just received it said you guys were still missing some flight info. The girls- Christina Glaze, Tiffani Barosa, and Layne Loebig all submitted our flight info and just wanted to make sure everything was set on your end!
hey hey, we have all of your flight info yup!
did y'all want to add any of the other party pass events? you have the booze cruise locked in
Perfect thank you! And no we are all good!! We're just gonna stick with the booze cruise! Thank you
safe travels today! I'll be on a diff resort but will see y'all at the booze cruise
Thanks so much! We're so excited
Its been lit for sure. y'all are gonna love it lol
Spiffy!! Is there anyway we can get 3 girl tickets for Congo bongo tn ???
Yo! I think it's sold out for tonight unfort
Awww okay no worries thank you!
